description: Trace the root cause of the Kafka producer buffer pool reuse race condition that causes messages to appear on the wrong topic (KAFKA-19012)

Dockerfile: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/sg-evals/kafka--be816b82.git . && git config user.email "agent@example.com" && git config user.name "Agent"
Dockerfile.artifact_only: git clone --filter=blob:none --no-checkout https://github.com/apache/kafka.git . && git checkout be816b82d25370ceac697ccf7c88cea873e9b4e3 && git config user.email "agent@example.com" && git config user.name "Agent"
